# VotePosition

The individual yea/nay/abstain position of each legislator on each roll call vote. Highest-volume table.

**GraphQL type:** `VotePosition` · **Connection:** `VotePositionsConnection`

## Queries

| Query | Returns | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `allVotePositions(filter, orderBy, first, last, before, after)` | `VotePositionsConnection` | Paginated list with filtering and ordering |
| `votePositionById(id: BigInt!)` | `VotePosition` | Look up by primary key |

## Fields

| Field | GraphQL Type | Notes |
|-------|-------------|-------|
| `id` | `BigInt` |  <span style={{background:'#1877f2',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>PK</span> |
| `voteId` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> <span style={{background:'#198754',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>FK</span> |
| `bioguideId` | `String` |  <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> <span style={{background:'#198754',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>FK</span> |
| `position` | `String` | The recorded vote position. Values: Yea, Nay, Not Voting, Present, VP (vice presidential tie-breaker). <span style={{background:'#dc3545',color:'#fff',borderRadius:'3px',padding:'1px 5px',fontSize:'0.7rem',fontWeight:600,whiteSpace:'nowrap'}}>required</span> |
| `party` | `String` | Party at time of vote (snapshotted from upstream data to avoid joins for common analytics). |
| `state` | `String` |  |

## Relationships

### Belongs to

| Field | Returns | Via |
|-------|---------|-----|
| `voteByVoteId` | `Vote` | `voteId` |
| `legislatorByBioguideId` | `Legislator` | `bioguideId` |

## Example

```graphql
{
  allVotePositions(
    filter: {
      voteId: { equalTo: "s83-119.2025" }
    }
  ) {
    nodes {
      position
      party
      state
      legislatorByBioguideId {
        officialFull
      }
    }
  }
}
```
